violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface * was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. - Cutting board on the prep table and prep sink cutting board require resurfacing or replacement due to cuts and scratches.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling tiles and vents have an accumulation of dirt on them.
